name: email-triage
description: Epistemic email triage with 30 Bayesian rationality criteria (LessWrong Sequences). Multi-axis scoring, 4-tier routing with color indicators (🔴🟡🔵⚪) and explanations. Supports iCloud (Mail.app), Gmail (MCP), and other providers. Production-tested resilience, safe batch moving, HTML validation, UTF-8 folder support.
author: Pablo Rodríguez López (mindandhealth.org)
